title: Additional Recipes
body:
Just adds more QoA recipes, here's a list:

- ### Saddle

- ### Iron Horse Armor

- ### Gold Horse Armor

- ### Diamond Horse Armor

- ### Name Tag

- ### Cobblestone into tuff, calcite, dripstone block, andesite, diorite, granite through stonecutter (works in reverse)

- ### Blackstone into basalt through stonecutter (works in reverse)

- ### Slabs into Full Block (except copper slabs)

v1.1 Adds more recipes:

- ### Chain into iron nugget through furnace, blast furnace
- ### Cooked food into charcoal (aka burn your food) through furnace, smoker
- ### Rotten flesh and phantom membrane into leather through furnace, smoker
